description_long: This is a young adult female pedestrian with a casual urban appearance. She is wearing a short-sleeved tie-dye t-shirt and fitted jeans, paired with chunky sneakers. Her arms are relaxed at her sides, and her posture is upright, suggesting she is either standing or about to walk. Her hair is long, straight, and parted to one side, cascading over her shoulders and back. The clothing fits closely to her body, and there are no visible accessories or carried objects. The overall look is modern and suitable for a city or neighborhood environment.
description: A casually dressed young adult woman stands upright in a tie-dye t-shirt, jeans, and sneakers, with long straight hair parted to one side.
description_view_0: Front view shows her facial features, tie-dye t-shirt, fitted jeans, and sneakers, with arms relaxed at her sides.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the profile of her face, the drape of her hair, and the side seam of her clothing.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the back of her head, hair, and the fit of her t-shirt and jeans, as well as the backs of her sneakers.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing her profile, hair, and the side of her outfit.
attribute_clothing_type: casual short-sleeved t-shirt and fitted jeans
attribute_hairstyle: long straight hair parted to one side
